# `api.commodity_maps.delete`

> `DELETE /commodity-map/{id}` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.commodity_maps.delete(map_id: str) -> ServiceBaseResponse
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab commodity_maps delete <map_id>
```

DELETE /commodity-map/{id}

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
